title: Add AdditiveChi2Sampler / PolynomialCountSketch / SkewedChi2Sampler kernel approximations
description:
sklearn.kernel_approximation has 5 estimators; ferrolearn-kernel currently has Nystroem and RBFSampler. Missing:
- AdditiveChi2Sampler — additive chi-squared kernel sampling
- PolynomialCountSketch — polynomial kernel approximation via count sketch
- SkewedChi2Sampler — skewed chi-squared kernel sampling

Lower priority. Each is a feature-mapping transformer with fit/transform; relatively small additions but no urgent caller.
